content.json:
# Upload Web — Panel de Observabilidad
Métricas operativas del portal de subida de albaranes.

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == 'upload_sessions_created'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize Sessions = sum(valueCount) by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Upload Volume per Hour

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == 'upload_sessions_created'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize Sessions = sum(valueCount) by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Upload Volume per Day
Success / Abandon / Error Rates

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == 'upload_preflight_duration_seconds'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize P50 = percentile(value, 50), P95 = percentile(value, 95), P99 = percentile(value, 99) by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Preflight Duration (p50 / p95 / p99)

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == 'upload_files_processed'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend supplier = tostring(customDimensions['supplier'])
| summarize Files = sum(valueCount) by supplier
| top 10 by Files desc
content.title: Top Uploaders (by supplier)

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == 'upload_confirm_duration_seconds'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize AvgDuration = avg(value), P95 = percentile(value, 95) by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Average Session Duration (confirm latency)
